info.title: stockchecker
info.summary: The APIs help in performing stock management in super market.
info.description: The APIs help in checking the current grocery stock of all the super market and help to manage the stock availability and supply management

get.description: This service returns all the grocery items of super market/company.

parameters.name: recordLimit
parameters.description: How many records should be displayed in a page

parameters.name: filterBy
parameters.description: Based on the filter criteria the records will be displayed

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the supermarket uniqueId

status.description: This is the status of the service.

message.description: this is the additional message to the status.

itemsList.description: This is the set of grocery items that are present in the company and the items result might vary based on filter criterias.

value.errorMessage: Password provided is invalid.Please provide valid password to continue.
The requested item could not be found.
We are experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.

post.description: This service adds or updates the grocery details of a company.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the supermarket uniqueId

requestBody.description: This contains all the values of an Item that is sold by the company in the store. This operation saves the item to the company's grocery list.

201.description: Item is successfully added/updated to the existing grocery list of the company.

status.description: Describes the status of the operation. whether the item got successfully created.

message.description: This is the message description post successful creation.

data.description: This contains unique information related to the grocery item after successful creation of item.

itemNo.description: This is the unique identifier for grocery item.

createdAt.description: This is the date when the grocery item got added to the grocery list.

Example 1.message: New item added to stock successfully

value.message: New item added to stock successfully

value.errorMessage: The request contains invalid data.

details.reason: Validation error.Fields invalid - totalItemCount - Value must be a positive integer

value.errorMessage: Password provided is invalid.Please provide valid password to continue.
company compXYZ does not exist.

post.description: This service adds new supplier to the supplier list

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the company id.

message.description: This is the message that provides additional information of successful transaction.

data.description: This provides information on the transaction performed.

supplierId.description: This is the supplier id that identifies a seller company.

itemsList.description: This is the item list that the seller sells.

post.description: This service helps place new order of items to a particular supplier.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the company Id.

orderId.description: This is the orderId against which the grocery items order is placed for a supplier.

orderName.description: The is the order name supporting the order id.

supplierId.description: This is the unique supplier id which tags the supplier to which the order is placed.

supplierContact.description: This is the primary contact number of supplier.

expectedDeliveryDate.description: This is the expected stock delivery date by which the items are expected to be delivered by the supplierto the grocery store.

stockDetails.description: This is the order of stock items. if more that 1 item is supplied by the seller then all the needed items are placed from the seller are placed in 1 single request.

itemName.description: THis is the item name required from supplier.

itemId.description: This is the unique ItemId associated with the item.

itemCount.description: This is the item count i.e the max count of the item needed.

itemDescription.description: This is the description or additional information associated with the item.

200.description: Order is successfully placed to supplier.

status.description: This is the status of the order placed.

message.description: This is the additonal message associated with status.

data.description: This is the data object that contains the core details of the order response.

orderId.description: Unique order id of the order placed to suppier.

notificationStatus.description: This is the notification object that contains notification properties.

isSmsSuccess.description: This indicates whether the order via sms is succesfully sent to primary contact number of supplier.

isEmailSuccess.description: This indicates whether the order via email is succesfully sent to registered email id of supplier.

failureReason.description: This contains the details if the sms or email notifcation fails or anyother reason for request failure.

Example 1.message: Supply order created and notifications dispatched.

value.message: Supply order created and notifications dispatched.

get.description: This service tracks the order placed to the supplier and its status. The service defaults to last 7 days from the current date and also accepts from and to date as optional parameters.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: This is the "from" date from which the order will be filtered and displayed.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: This is "to" date till which the order will be filtered and displayed.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the company id, an unique identifier for the grocery store.

status.description: This is the status of the service.

message.description: This is the additional message associated with the status.

data.description: This is the data object containing the orderdetails.

totalOrders.description: This is the total orders placed between the specified dates or default last 7 days from current date.

fromDate.description: This is the "from" date from which the total orders is displayed

toDate.description: This is the "to" date till which the order requests were placed.

orders.description: This is the order object containing the itemdetials for each order.

Example 1.message: Orders retrieved successfully for the requested period.

value.message: Orders retrieved successfully for the requested period.

value.errorMessage: Invalid Request: companyId must follow the format CompXXXX
Password provided is invalid.Please provide valid password to continue.
No resource found.
We are experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.

patch.description: This is used to update the stock received status and received date for the items placed in an order.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the company id, an unique identifier for the grocery store.

orders.description: This is the updated order details object with stock received status and date received info.

200.description: Updated the order Id successfully with order status.

status.description: This is the status of the update triggered on an order id.

message.description: This is the additional message supporting the status.

data.description: This is the data object containing the update status.

orderIdList.description: This is the order id list submitted for update with stock status.

orderId.description: This is the unique order to which the updates are added.

itemIdList.description: This is the item list object associated with every order

itemId.description: THis is the unique itemId in which updates are performed.

status.description: This is the status related to the item id update. This can contain both success message or failure reason.

Example 1.message: Stock received dates updated successfully for the requested items.

value.message: Stock received dates updated successfully for the requested items.

value.errorMessage: The request contains invalid data.

details.reason: Validation error.Fields invalid - supplierId- Value must be a positive integer

value.errorMessage: Password provided is invalid.Please provide valid password to continue.

get.description: This service retrieves payment details of orders pending payment to suppliers.If an order is already paid then the orderId will not be retrieved in this service.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the unique company id of the grocery store.

status.description: THis is the status of the transaction.

message.description: This is the associated status message

data.description: Thisis the data object that contains payment details

totalRecords.description: THis is the total number of records helpful for pagination.

paymentList.description: this is the payment list. so all the payments where payment.isPaymentSuccess is false i.e for the orders that are pending payment , the details will be retrieved.

value.errorMessage: Invalid Request: companyId must follow the format CompXXXX

post.description: This is the payment entry created for an order id for a supplier.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the unique company id of the grocery store.

201.description: successsfully creating the supplier payment entry.

status.description: THis is the status of the transaction.

message.description: this is the associated message for the status.

data.description: This is the data obkect that contains the payment info.

paymentId.description: THis is the unique payment id which corresponds to the payment information for the order id.

createdAt.description: This is the payment entry created date. This is for the audit purpose to track the transaction.

transactionType.description: This is the transaction type defaults to "SUPPLIER_PAYMENT" as we dont have any other kind as of now and will be used in future for differentiation.

patch.description: This service updates the payment entry for an order once payment is done.Key fields payment date and isPayment success are updated through this.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: This is the unique company id of the grocery store.

status.description: This is the status of the transaction.

message.description: This is the associated status message.

data.description: THis is the data object that holds payment details

paymentId.description: THis is the unique payment id that got updated successfully with payment date and payment status.

transactionType.description: This is the transaction type.Defaults to "SUPPLIER_PAYMENT".

Item.title: Item
Item.description: This is the details of each item.

itemId.description: This is the unique item no.

itemCategory.description: This is the item Category which can be used in filter criteria to filter out the grocery list and get responses.

itemName.description: this is the item name associated with item id

companyName.description: This is the company name in which the items are available.

companyId.description: This is the unique company id associated with company name.

perishable.description: This is the value that is associated with perishable food products.This indicates whether the food is perishable.

shelfLifeInDays.description: This tells how many days will the food remain fresh. If a product is still in market after the given date, then the item must be discarded or thrown and not for sale.

totalItemCount.description: This describes the total number of items in this particular category.

currentStockCount.description: This describes what is the current count for this item available to sell.

restockAlert.description: This property describes whether the particular item need to be restocked.If the item count goes below a certain minimum value then thhis value is set to true.

fastSelling.description: This property indicates whether the item falls under fast selling.Based on this the restock interval or number of items per order will be increased.

sellerName.description: This si the company from which the product is ordered for selling.

lastRestockedDate.description: This is for stock maintenance purpose. Helps in billing and supply management.

expectedRestockDate.description: This is for stock maintenance purpose. Helps in billing and supply management.Value should be greate thatn last restocked date.

itemPackedDt.description: This captures the item packed date for safety reasons.

itemExpiryDate.description: This captures the item expiry date and items beyond expiry date must be periodically removed. All the persiahble foods should have a sticker indicating the dates.

ErrorResponse.description: Error Component standard across all operations.

status.description: This describes the status of the transaction. In the error scenario ddefault value will be 'error'.

errorType.description: This describes the exact error Type. Adds more info on why the transaction failed.

errorMessage.description: This describes the supporting or more descriptive error msg for a particular error type.

details.description: This describes the extra details for finding the root cause.

traceId.description: Unique id for the particular transaction.

reason.description: Additional details that adds to the failure root cause.

itemNo.description: This is the unique identifying number for the whole transaction. This comes in request.This is also optional if the error is related to incoming request parameters, then this will be coming in response.

conflictingField.description: If there are any conflicting fields on that particular transaction and due to which the whole operation failed then this will be coming in response. It is optional field.

examples.message: We are experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.
An item with this Item Number already exists in the system.

details.reason: Validation error.Fields invalid - totalItemCount - Value must be a positive integer

examples.errorMessage: Authentication required. Please provide a valid API key or login to continue.
The requested item could not be found.

Example 1.message: We are experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.

supplierId.description: This is the unique Id that identifies the supplier.

itemsList.description: This si the item Id list that this supplier supplies to the Grocery Store.It can be 1 product or many.

itemId.description: THis is the item Id that supplier sells.

companyName.description: This si the supplier's registered company name.

contactNumber.description: This si the primary contact number of the supplier.

alternateContactNumber.description: This is the laternate contact number and this is optional.

emailId.description: THis is the emailId to officially mail all the agreement and payment details.

deliverySchedule.description: This object holds delivery schedule data during which the seller regularly sends stock to the market

lastRestockedDate.description: This is the last date when the delivery was made by the supplier.

expectedRestockDate.description: THis is the next future date when the delivery is expected to happen.

agreementDetails.description: This is the agreement details object containing the agreement details made with the supplier.

advanceAmountPaid.description: THis is the advance amount paid during the initial agreement.

lastPaymentDate.description: This property holds the last payment date when the supplier was provided with the money for supplying items.

nextPaymentDate.description: THis property keeps track of the next payment date.

lastPaidAmount.description: THis is the last paid amount. Amount paid to seller during last payment date.

expectedPayAmount.description: THis is the due amount to be paid to seller.

OrderResponse.description: This contains the order information. This object is used to track and update supply order status.

orderId.description: This is the unique order id associated with an order placed to supplier.

supplierId.description: This is the supplier id associated with the order.

additionalInfo.description: THis is the additional info if any for a particular order.

itemsList.description: This is the itemList that contains all the items related to the orderId.

itemId.description: THis is the unique itemId associated with every item.

itemName.description: THis is the item name corresponding to the item Id.

isStockReceived.description: This indicates whether the stock is received against the order placed.

stockReceivedDate.description: This is the date when the stock placed reaches the grocery store.

SupplierPayment.description: This is the supplier payment object used to track supplier payment for each order.

paymentId.description: This is the unique payment id of the supplier payment request

orderId.description: This is the orderId for which supplier payment details are created.

orderName.description: This is the order name associated with order id.

supplierId.description: This is the supplier Id identifying the supplier to whom the payment has to be made.

supplierCompanyName.description: THis is the supplier company name

supplierContact.description: This is the supplier contact number.

paymentSummary.description: This is the payment sumary object under which payment details are provided.

totalAmountToBePaid.description: This is the tomtal amount to be paid for the order id.

advanceAmount.description: This is the advance amount that grocery store gave to supplier during the initial agreement.

isPaymentSuccess.description: This is the indicator set to false when a payment entry is created for a supplier for an order id.

paymentDate.description: THis is the date when payment is done.
